## Validation

- [ ] `npm run smoke`
- [ ] `npm run doctor`
- [ ] `npm run pack:dry`

## Privacy and safety

- [ ] No silent cloud upload was introduced.
- [ ] Temp audio cleanup behavior is preserved.
- [ ] Dictated text is still inserted for review, not auto-submitted.
- [ ] Docs were updated for user-visible behavior changes.
